timeline.title: Code freeze of 8.9.0-alpha3
timeline.note: Only bug fixes found during QA should be backported to this branch.
timeline.description: During this phase, release candidates are built from the branch until the release date whenever new fixes need QA validation.

timeline.title: Release of 8.9.0-alpha3
timeline.description: Final camunda/camunda artifacts should be tested and available for the overall C8 release train.

timeline.title: Stable branch creation for 8.9
timeline.note: Features for 8.9 should be backported here, from main.
timeline.description: Monorepo Release Manager creates the new stable branch from main, adjusting CI workflows as necessary. Features should be merged to main and backported here.

timeline.title: Feature freeze of 8.9.0
timeline.note: No new features, scope extensions, or risky changes are allowed on this branch anymore without exemption.
timeline.description: Lock the scope for the minor release. Allow only stabilization, fixes, testing improvements and late features with exemptions.
